business_quality: Pure-play AI cloud platform with enormous backlog and rapid infrastructure scaling.
growth_durability: High if backlog converts cleanly and financing remains available at tolerable cost.
key_risks: Leverage, interest burden, customer concentration, and any pause in AI infrastructure demand.
valuation_context: One of the strongest operating stories in the group, but also one of the most financing-sensitive.
notes: Several scorecard fields are normalized from the Q4 2025 release and related coverage rather than pulled from a single explicit company scorecard.
